news.title: Iron ore joins core sector as government revamps index
news.india_relevance: Changes India's core infrastructure measurement, impacting policy and investment analysis.
news.why_it_matters: Alters the official gauge of industrial output and economic health; reflects strategic importance of domestic iron ore supply chain.

news.title: Macros strong, but weak rains, war can hit growth: RBI Guv Sanjay Malhotra
news.india_relevance: Direct statement from RBI Governor on top risks to India's economic growth.
news.why_it_matters: High-level official assessment flags monsoon and West Asia conflict as key vulnerabilities, guiding monetary and fiscal policy expectations.

news.title: Sources: Trump Media pitched a monthly fee of as much as $100K for the Truth API, with fast access to Trump's posts, for banks, algorithmic traders, and others (Reuters)
Sources: the Trump administration is considering plans for an independent regulator to vet the safety of AI models; the regulator would report to the SEC (Bloomberg)
Filings: a group of major music publishers has agreed to end a copyright infringement dispute with X over the use of their music on the social media platform (Blake Brittain/Reuters)
The Philadelphia Semiconductor Index sank ~10% for the week, its largest weekly fall in over a year, and is now down ~20% from its late-June all-time high (Reuters)
Sources: Valar Atomics, which makes small nuclear reactors intended to power data centers, is in talks to raise $1B at a ~$5B pre-money valuation (The Information)
Apple raises iPhone prices in Japan by up to 11%, likely due to the Japanese yen's depreciation against the US dollar over the past year (Joe Rossignol/MacRumors)
Chinese AI has leveled up, and brought renewed focus on the open weight model shift
Amazon apologizes after some AWS users received bills as high as $1.5T due to "an issue with unit pricing within the estimated billing computation subsystem" (Robert Booth/The Guardian)
How Rich Are You?
US stocks today: US stocks end lower for the day and week as chip selloff broadens
Selective funding slows startup creation in India
Sources: OpenRouter has discussed a potential sale to a bigger tech company that could value it at billions of dollars, a premium to its $1.3B valuation in May (The Information)
IDBI Bank ups FCNR ante with 16% on offer
RIL charts multi-year plan to offset decline in natural gas output
'Air India to stay on expansion course despite headwinds,' says CCO Nipun Aggarwal
Sources: SpaceX is in talks with the DOD about providing the agency with access to data-center capacity worth billions of dollars for running AI models (Wall Street Journal)
Reliance Retail trades near-term gains for long-term digital access
EPFO launches VISHWAS 2026 to settle employer penalty disputes
Vande Bharat sleeper trains' rollout delayed as designs await approval
Centre rolls out Rs 5,175 crore mine reform incentive scheme
